title: Report Module Status Response Schema
description: Response schema for GET /api/v1/features/report-module-status. Returns a bare jsonify({state, schema_version}) (not success-envelope-wrapped). Intentionally not project-scoped — exposes only global rollout state and supported schema version, no project or run data.

state.description: Current rollout state of the report module

schema_version.description: Supported report payload schema version (matches ExperimentReportService.SCHEMA_VERSION)
